papers.title: On the Stability of Spherical Hellinger-Kantorovich Flows and Their Implications for Differential Privacy

papers.title: Training-Free Looped Transformers
papers.summary: We introduce training-free looped transformers, in which a lightweight inference-time wrapper loops a contiguous mid-stack block of layers of a frozen checkpoint without additional fine-tuning, continued training, or architectural changes.
